title: Nápověda akcí ve výpisu mini todo
goal: When 'mini todo' lists items (and thus via /mini:todo), it appends a short one-line hint of the available actions (add "<text>" / done <n> / remove <n>) so the user does not have to recall them; the existing empty-archive message keeps its add hint; covered by a unit test.

steps.title: Append actions hint to todo listing
steps.detail: In commands/todo.ts list(), after the open/total summary print a dim one-line hint of the available actions: add "<text>" / done <n> / remove <n>. The empty-archive branch keeps its existing add hint.

steps.title: Test the listing hint
steps.detail: Extend commands/todo.test.ts (capturing log output) to assert the actions hint appears when items exist and the add hint on an empty archive.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 98: Nápověda akcí ve výpisu mini todo
